---
title: "rikdom quickview"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    theme: none
---

```{=html}
<style>
  @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Fraunces:opsz,wght@9..144,300;9..144,400;9..144,500;9..144,600&family=JetBrains+Mono:wght@400;500;700&display=swap');

  :root {
    --paper: #F4EFE6;
    --linen: #E9E2D4;
    --stone: #B8AE9E;
    --graphite: #4A4239;
    --ink: #1F1A14;
    --border-soft: #D9D1C1;
    --fjord: #2C4A6B;
    --moss: #5F6B3A;
    --rust: #8A3A1F;
    --amber: #B98A2C;
    --font-serif: "Fraunces", "Iowan Old Style", Georgia, serif;
    --font-mono: "JetBrains Mono", ui-monospace, "SF Mono", Menlo, Consolas, monospace;
    color-scheme: light;
  }

  html, body { margin:0; padding:0; background:var(--paper); color:var(--ink); font-family:var(--font-serif); -webkit-font-smoothing:antialiased; text-rendering:optimizeLegibility; }

  .wrap { max-width:1040px; margin:0 auto; padding:40px 32px 64px; }

  .head { display:flex; align-items:flex-end; gap:24px; border-bottom:1px solid var(--stone); padding-bottom:20px; margin-bottom:32px; flex-wrap:wrap; }
  .brand { display:flex; align-items:baseline; gap:2px; }
  .wordmark { font-family:var(--font-serif); font-size:28px; font-weight:400; letter-spacing:-0.02em; font-variation-settings:'opsz' 144,'SOFT' 50; color:var(--ink); }
  .dot { width:6px; height:6px; background:var(--fjord); border-radius:50%; display:inline-block; margin-left:2px; translate:0 -2px; }
  .subtitle { margin-top:6px; font-family:var(--font-mono); font-size:12px; letter-spacing:0.04em; color:var(--graphite); }
  .head-actions { margin-left:auto; }
  .link { display:inline-block; color:var(--paper); background:var(--ink); text-decoration:none; padding:10px 16px; border:1px solid var(--ink); border-radius:4px; font-family:var(--font-serif); font-size:15px; font-weight:500; line-height:1; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.2,0,0,1); }
  .link:hover { background:#000; }
  .link:focus-visible { outline:2px solid var(--fjord); outline-offset:2px; }

  .eyebrow { font-family:var(--font-mono); font-size:11px; font-weight:500; letter-spacing:0.08em; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--graphite); }

  .grid { display:grid; gap:16px; grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit, minmax(320px,1fr)); }
  .half-grid { display:grid; gap:16px; grid-template-columns:1fr; margin-top:16px; }
  @media (min-width:880px) { .half-grid { grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; } }

  .panel { background:var(--linen); border:1px solid var(--stone); border-radius:4px; padding:28px 28px 24px; }

  .metric { font-family:var(--font-serif); font-size:44px; font-weight:300; font-variation-settings:'opsz' 144,'SOFT' 50; letter-spacing:-0.02em; line-height:1.05; margin:10px 0 4px; color:var(--ink); font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; }
  .muted { color:var(--graphite); font-family:var(--font-mono); font-size:12px; }

  svg { width:100%; height:auto; display:block; }

  .dist { display:grid; gap:18px; grid-template-columns:180px 1fr; align-items:start; }
  @media (max-width:680px) { .metric{font-size:32px;} .dist{grid-template-columns:1fr;} }

  .legend { display:grid; gap:8px; margin-top:4px; font-family:var(--font-mono); font-size:12px; }
  .legend-row { display:grid; grid-template-columns:10px 1fr auto; gap:10px; align-items:center; }
  .swatch { width:10px; height:10px; display:inline-block; }
  .legend-label { color:var(--ink); }
  .legend-pct { color:var(--graphite); }
  .value-col { text-align:right; color:var(--graphite); font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums; }

  .donut-center { font-size:10px; fill:var(--graphite); text-anchor:middle; font-family:var(--font-mono); letter-spacing:0.04em; text-transform:uppercase; }
  .donut-total { font-size:13px; fill:var(--ink); text-anchor:middle; font-family:var(--font-mono); font-weight:500; }

  .chart-axis { stroke:var(--stone); }
  .chart-grid { stroke:var(--border-soft); }
  .chart-tick { fill:var(--graphite); font-family:var(--font-mono); font-size:11px; }
  .chart-line { stroke:var(--fjord); stroke-width:2; fill:none; stroke-linecap:round; stroke-linejoin:round; }

  .warn { color:var(--rust); }

  @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) {
    :root:not([data-theme="light"]) {
      --paper: #14161A;
      --linen: #1B1E23;
      --stone: #2E3138;
      --border-soft: #24272D;
      --graphite: #B8B1A1;
      --ink: #E8E3D8;
      --fjord: #8AA9CE;
      --moss: #9AAE6B;
      --rust: #C9775A;
      --amber: #D9B070;
      color-scheme: dark;
    }
  }
</style>

<script src="report-data.js"></script>

<div class="wrap">
  <div class="head">
    <div>
      <div class="brand"><span class="wordmark">rikdom</span><span class="dot"></span></div>
      <div class="subtitle" id="subtitle"></div>
    </div>
    <div class="head-actions">
      <a class="link" href="portfolio-report.html">Open deep-dive report</a>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="grid">
    <section class="panel">
      <div class="eyebrow">Current total</div>
      <div class="metric" id="total">—</div>
      <div class="muted">Based on latest snapshot</div>
    </section>
    <section class="panel">
      <div class="eyebrow" style="margin-bottom:10px;">Progress over time</div>
      <svg id="line" viewBox="0 0 700 240" preserveAspectRatio="none"></svg>
    </section>
  </div>

  <div class="half-grid">
    <section class="panel">
      <div class="eyebrow" style="margin-bottom:16px;">Current allocation by asset class</div>
      <div class="dist">
        <svg id="asset-donut" viewBox="0 0 180 180"></svg>
        <div class="legend" id="asset-legend"></div>
      </div>
    </section>

    <section class="panel">
      <div class="eyebrow" style="margin-bottom:16px;">Market value by currency (converted to <span id="base-ccy"></span>)</div>
      <div class="dist">
        <svg id="currency-donut" viewBox="0 0 180 180"></svg>
        <div class="legend" id="currency-legend"></div>
      </div>
      <div class="muted warn" id="currency-warning" style="margin-top:12px;"></div>
    </section>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
  (() => {
    const payload = window.RIKDOM_REPORT_DATA || {};
    const sections = payload.sections || {};
    const quick = sections.quickview || {};
    // rikdom palette — ink/graphite/stone ladder + fjord/moss/amber/rust accents
    const palette = ['#1F1A14','#4A4239','#8A7A64','#B8AE9E','#2C4A6B','#5F6B3A','#B98A2C','#8A3A1F'];

    const CCY_RE = /^[A-Z]{3}$/;
    const safeCcy = (raw) => {
      const normalized = String(raw || '').trim().toUpperCase();
      return CCY_RE.test(normalized) ? normalized : 'USD';
    };
    const escapeHtml = (value) => String(value ?? '')
      .replace(/&/g, '&amp;')
      .replace(/</g, '&lt;')
      .replace(/>/g, '&gt;')
      .replace(/"/g, '&quot;')
      .replace(/'/g, '&#39;');

    const baseCurrency = safeCcy(payload?.profile?.base_currency);
    const profileName = String(payload?.profile?.display_name || 'Portfolio');
    const snapshots = Array.isArray(sections.timeline) ? sections.timeline : [];
    const latest = snapshots.length ? snapshots[snapshots.length - 1] : null;

    const fmt = (value, ccy) => new Intl.NumberFormat(undefined, {
      style: 'currency',
      currency: safeCcy(ccy),
      maximumFractionDigits: 2,
    }).format(value);
    const fmtCompact = (value, ccy) => {
      const formatted = new Intl.NumberFormat(undefined, {
        notation: 'compact',
        maximumFractionDigits: 1,
      }).format(Number(value) || 0);
      return `${formatted} ${safeCcy(ccy)}`;
    };
    const pct = (value, total) => total > 0 ? `${((value / total) * 100).toFixed(1)}%` : '0.0%';

    document.getElementById('subtitle').textContent = `${profileName} · base ${baseCurrency}`;
    document.getElementById('base-ccy').textContent = baseCurrency;
    if (latest && typeof latest.portfolio_value_base === 'number') {
      document.getElementById('total').textContent = fmt(latest.portfolio_value_base, baseCurrency);
    }

    function renderLineChart(points) {
      const svg = document.getElementById('line');
      if (!points.length) {
        svg.innerHTML = '<text x="30" y="40" class="chart-tick">No snapshots yet</text>';
        return;
      }
      const values = points.map(p => Number(p?.portfolio_value_base) || 0);
      const min = Math.min(...values); const max = Math.max(...values); const range = Math.max(max - min, 1);
      const W=700,H=240,padLeft=84,padRight=16,padTop=20,padBottom=40,innerW=W-padLeft-padRight,innerH=H-padTop-padBottom;
      const xFor = (i) => padLeft + (i / Math.max(points.length - 1, 1)) * innerW;
      const yFor = (v) => padTop + (1 - ((v - min) / range)) * innerH;
      const formatYm = (ts, idx) => (typeof ts === 'string' && ts.length >= 7 ? ts.slice(0, 7) : `#${idx + 1}`);
      const path = points.map((p, i) => `${i===0?'M':'L'} ${xFor(i).toFixed(1)} ${yFor(Number(p?.portfolio_value_base)||0).toFixed(1)}`).join(' ');
      const yTicks = 4;
      const yGrid = Array.from({ length: yTicks + 1 }).map((_, i) => {
        const ratio = i / yTicks; const v = max - ratio * (max - min); const y = yFor(v);
        return { y, label: fmtCompact(v, baseCurrency) };
      });
      const xTickCount = Math.min(6, Math.max(points.length, 2));
      const xTickIndexes = [...new Set(Array.from({ length: xTickCount }).map((_, i) => Math.round((i / Math.max(xTickCount - 1, 1)) * (points.length - 1))))];

      svg.innerHTML = `
        ${yGrid.map(t => `<line class="chart-grid" x1="${padLeft}" y1="${t.y.toFixed(1)}" x2="${W - padRight}" y2="${t.y.toFixed(1)}"/>`).join('')}
        <line class="chart-axis" x1="${padLeft}" y1="${padTop}" x2="${padLeft}" y2="${H - padBottom}"/>
        <line class="chart-axis" x1="${padLeft}" y1="${H - padBottom}" x2="${W - padRight}" y2="${H - padBottom}"/>
        <path class="chart-line" d="${escapeHtml(path)}"/>
        ${yGrid.map(t => `<text class="chart-tick" x="${padLeft - 8}" y="${(t.y + 4).toFixed(1)}" text-anchor="end">${escapeHtml(t.label)}</text>`).join('')}
        ${xTickIndexes.map((idx) => `<text class="chart-tick" x="${xFor(idx).toFixed(1)}" y="${H - 12}" text-anchor="middle">${escapeHtml(formatYm(points[idx]?.timestamp, idx))}</text>`).join('')}
      `;
    }

    function renderDistribution({ svgId, legendId, entries, total, formatValue, centerLabel }) {
      const svg = document.getElementById(svgId); const legend = document.getElementById(legendId);
      if (!entries.length || total <= 0) {
        svg.innerHTML = '<text x="90" y="95" class="donut-center">No data</text>';
        legend.innerHTML = '<div class="muted">No data</div>';
        return;
      }
      const cx=90, cy=90, r=62, strokeW=18, circumference=2*Math.PI*r; let offset=0;
      const slices = entries.map((entry, index) => {
        const ratio = entry.value / total; const dash = Math.max(ratio * circumference, 0); const color = palette[index % palette.length];
        const piece = `<circle cx="${cx}" cy="${cy}" r="${r}" fill="none" stroke="${color}" stroke-width="${strokeW}" stroke-dasharray="${dash} ${circumference - dash}" stroke-dashoffset="-${offset}" transform="rotate(-90 ${cx} ${cy})"></circle>`;
        offset += dash;
        return { piece, color, ...entry };
      });
      svg.innerHTML = `
        <circle cx="${cx}" cy="${cy}" r="${r}" fill="none" stroke="#D9D1C1" stroke-width="${strokeW}"></circle>
        ${slices.map(s => s.piece).join('')}
        <text x="${cx}" y="${cy - 4}" class="donut-center">${escapeHtml(centerLabel)}</text>
        <text x="${cx}" y="${cy + 14}" class="donut-total">${escapeHtml(fmtCompact(total, baseCurrency))}</text>
      `;
      legend.innerHTML = slices.map(slice => `
        <div class="legend-row">
          <span class="swatch" style="background:${escapeHtml(slice.color)}"></span>
          <span class="legend-label">${escapeHtml(slice.label)} <span class="legend-pct">(${escapeHtml(pct(slice.value, total))})</span></span>
          <span class="value-col">${escapeHtml(formatValue(slice))}</span>
        </div>
      `).join('');
    }

    const assetClass = Object.entries(latest?.by_asset_class || quick.latest_by_asset_class || {})
      .map(([label, value]) => ({ label, value: Number(value) || 0 }))
      .filter(row => row.value > 0)
      .sort((a, b) => b.value - a.value);
    renderDistribution({
      svgId: 'asset-donut',
      legendId: 'asset-legend',
      entries: assetClass,
      total: assetClass.reduce((a, b) => a + b.value, 0),
      centerLabel: 'Asset class',
      formatValue: (row) => fmtCompact(row.value, baseCurrency)
    });

    const native = quick?.currency?.native || {};
    const converted = quick?.currency?.converted_base || {};
    const currencyEntries = Object.entries(converted)
      .map(([currency, value]) => ({ label: currency, value: Number(value) || 0, native: Number(native[currency] || 0) }))
      .filter(row => row.value > 0)
      .sort((a, b) => b.value - a.value);
    renderDistribution({
      svgId: 'currency-donut',
      legendId: 'currency-legend',
      entries: currencyEntries,
      total: currencyEntries.reduce((a, b) => a + b.value, 0),
      centerLabel: 'Currency FX',
      formatValue: (row) => `${fmtCompact(row.value, baseCurrency)} · ${fmtCompact(row.native, row.label)}`
    });

    const missing = Array.isArray(quick?.currency?.missing_rates) ? quick.currency.missing_rates : [];
    document.getElementById('currency-warning').textContent = missing.length ? `Missing FX rates for: ${missing.join(', ')}` : '';

    renderLineChart(snapshots);
  })();
</script>
```
